gates.name: learning_loop_suite
gates.command: python -m pytest -q borg/tests/test_e2e_learning_loop_v3.py borg/tests/test_v3_integration.py borg/tests/test_failure_memory.py borg/tests/test_mutation_engine.py borg/tests/test_feedback_loop.py borg/tests/test_contextual_selector.py --tb=short

gates.name: core_production_gates
gates.command: python -m pytest -q borg/tests/test_rescue.py borg/tests/test_runtime_fingerprint.py borg/tests/test_embeddings_schema_compat.py eval/tests/test_security_hardening_baseline.py borg/tests/test_confidence_gate.py borg/tests/test_borg_observe_confidence_gate.py borg/tests/test_first_10_readiness.py --tb=short

gates.name: security_gate_check
gates.summary: PASS: Borg security hardening policy gate

gates.name: mcp_observe_canaries_in_process
gates.summary: unrelated NO_CONFIDENT=True STALE=False; permission PERMISSION=True STALE=False

operator: Directly verify live served MCP runtime through actual configured MCP client/process boundary without unsafe gateway kill/restart/signal.
Review dirty tree/generated artifacts and commit or clean intended release contents.
Human review public copy before announcement.
reality: First-10 real external users are still 0.
Public self-serve requires 10 real users, >=8 installs, >=6 useful rescues, and 0 critical privacy/security failures.
Frontier-better-than requires controlled A/B benchmark with matched randomized tasks, current frontier baseline, positive/non-null metrics/deltas, paired rows, and statistical confidence.
